afterSnapshot.name: fetchRouteWeather
afterSnapshot.purpose: Fetch a single Open-Meteo forecast (hourly winds/precip/pressure/cloud + daily sunrise/sunset) for a route leg destination, returning a Result.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Per-leg weather is needed to flag risks; a dedicated fetch avoids touching the hot shared fetchWeather used up to 8x by analyzeDirections.
implementation: Mirrors fetchWeather's Result style and m/s→knots conversion but adds daily sunrise/sunset, drops the marine call, and exposes utc_offset_seconds so the orchestrator can resolve arrival hours/sun times.
